name: Ofanimon

signature_move.name: Eden's Javelin
signature_move.description: 12Stabs the enemy with its javelin.Fires a ray of holy light from its javelin.

description: An Ophan Digimon that is the final form of feminine Angel Digimon. It is one of the Three Archangel Digimon who protect the Digital World's core " Kernel " ( God 's domain), alongside Seraphimon and Cherubimon . As the Digital World's Holy Mother -like being, it imparts the loving and merciful side of God, while Seraphimon is the executor of the enlightened God's laws, and Cherubimon is the guardian of God and its wisdom; each has their own duty. Its Special Moves are " Eden's Javelin " and " Sefirot Crystal ".
